diagrams.title: Simplified CPU Data Path for an ADD Operation

visuals.title: Alu Operations
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">ALU and Control Unit</text>

  <!-- ALU Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="80" width="100" height="60" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ALU
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Control Unit Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="200" width="100" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="235" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Control Unit
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Connection Arrow (Control to ALU) -->
  <line x1="210" y1="200" x2="210" y2="140" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <polygon points="210,140 214,150 206,150" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Input Data Lines -->
  <line x1="110" y1="110" x2="160" y2="110" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="135" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Input Data
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Output Data Lines -->
  <line x1="260" y1="110" x2="310" y2="110" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="285" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Result
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Control Signals Label -->
  <text x="210" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Control Signals
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Status Signals Label -->
  <line x1="210" y1="140" x2="210" y2="200" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="4" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="230" y="170" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Status
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
